mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, password, nickname, email, biz_number, company_name, opening_date, store_image, zonecode, address1, address2, phone, user_type ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{bizNo}, #{corpName}, #{formattedOpenDate}, #{storeImage}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{detailAddress}, #{phone}, #{userType} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
